summary: Completed testing of real-time WebSocket updates for Host dashboard. All 6 features verified as WORKING: (1) Real-time badge and Connected status visible, (2) Player join broadcasts instantly via WebSocket with toast notification, (3) Mode selection broadcasts instantly via WebSocket, (4) Answer submission broadcasts with score/streak updates and toast notification, (5) Polling reduced to 15-second fallback (only when WebSocket disconnected), (6) Participant data (selected_mode, score, streak, answers) preserved on WebSocket connect.
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket handler (line 1254-1339 in play_to_learn.py) correctly sends full participant data on 'connected' message including selected_mode, score, streak, answers
player_joined broadcast (line 828-839) sends full participant data with score, streak, selected_mode, answers
answer_submitted broadcast (line 1074-1088) sends score, streak, answers_count, correct_count, selected_mode
player_mode_selected broadcast (line 888-894) sends participant_id, nickname, selected_mode
Frontend handleWebSocketMessage (line 165-243 in PlayToLearnHost.js) correctly handles all message types and updates state
Polling interval correctly set to 15000ms (15 seconds) at line 96, only when !wsConnected (line 66)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 6 features verified working via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Used existing ALL_MODES session ps_4e12196eafae47cb with 20+ participants
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-time WebSocket updates fully tested and working. Key features: (1) 'Real-time' badge with Zap icon shows when WebSocket connected, (2) 'Connected' status with green Wifi icon, (3) Toast notifications for player_joined and answer_submitted events, (4) Player cards update instantly with mode badges and scores, (5) Stats cards (Playing, Choosing, Answers, Accuracy) update in real-time, (6) Polling is 15-second fallback only when WebSocket disconnected.

realtime_badge_and_connected_status.description: Real-time WebSocket connection shows 'Real-time' badge and 'Connected' status in Host view
realtime_badge_and_connected_status.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Real-time' badge with Zap icon and 'Connected' with green Wifi icon in top-right corner

player_join_instant_update.description: When a student joins a LIVE session, the Host dashboard updates instantly via WebSocket
player_join_instant_update.evidence: Console log shows '[Host] WebSocket message: player_joined', toast shows 'RealtimeTest_1772148461989 joined!', player count increased from 20 to 21

mode_selection_instant_update.description: When a student selects a game mode in ALL_MODES session, the Host dashboard shows the mode badge instantly
mode_selection_instant_update.evidence: Console log shows '[Host] WebSocket message: player_mode_selected', player card shows 'Quiz' badge for RealtimeTest_1772148461989

answer_submission_instant_update.description: When a student submits an answer, the Host dashboard updates their score, progress, and shows a toast notification
answer_submission_instant_update.evidence: Console log shows '[Host] WebSocket message: answer_submitted {is_correct: true, score: 1}', toast shows 'RealtimeTest_1772148461989 - Correct', Answers count increased to 3, Accuracy shows 100%

polling_15_second_fallback.description: Polling is reduced to 15-second fallback (only when WebSocket disconnects)
polling_15_second_fallback.evidence: Frontend code at line 96 shows 'setInterval(..., 15000)' and line 66 shows 'if (!wsConnected)' condition

participant_data_preserved.description: All participant data (selected_mode, score, streak, answers) is preserved when WebSocket connects
participant_data_preserved.evidence: Console log shows '[Host] WebSocket message: connected {participants: Array(20)}' with full participant data including selected_mode, score, streak, answers

websocket_messages_verified.connected: Sends full participant data on WebSocket connect
websocket_messages_verified.player_joined: Broadcasts when new player joins with participant data
websocket_messages_verified.player_mode_selected: Broadcasts when player selects game mode
websocket_messages_verified.answer_submitted: Broadcasts with score, streak, is_correct, answers_count
